metadata.title: Haywood Living: Ultimate Senior Living Redefine
metadata.description: Discover premium elderly care in Bangsar with Haywood Living. We redefine retirement by offering luxurious facilities, personalized medical care, and engaging activities. Experience comfort and peace of mind. Visit us today!

# Premium Elderly Care in Malaysia

Haywood Living

Rehab, Recover, Retire

The premium elderly care centre located in prime locations across Malaysia that redefines retirement.

[Learn More](https://haywoodliving.co/about-us/)

Our Facilities

## Providing Quality Senior Living

### Comprehensive Medical Care Onsite

Our in-house team of doctors, nurses, and TCM practitioners ensures that residents receive continuous and personalized medical attention, providing peace of mind and optimal health.

### Safe and Secure Environment

We prioritize safety with a well-monitored, secure environment, giving families peace of mind knowing their loved ones are in trusted hands throughout the day.

### Fun and Leisure Activities

Enjoy a variety of entertainment options, including games, music, and movies to keep participants engaged.

### Convenient Location with Easy Access

Located in the heart of Kuala Lumpur, our facility is easily accessible, making drop-off and pick-up convenient for families in the surrounding areas.

### Luxurious and Comfortable Living Spaces

Our premium facilities are designed for comfort and elegance, with spacious rooms and relaxing communal areas that feel like home while promoting social interaction and well-being.

### Nutritionally Balanced Meals

Delicious, healthy meals prepared daily by our culinary team, catering to dietary needs.

Our Living Spaces

Our Location

## Find Our Elderly Care Near You

Kuala Lumpur Putrajaya Subang Jaya Penang Boonlay Bukit Timah

![haywood living at domitys bangsar](https://haywoodliving.co/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/haywood-living-at-domitys-bangsar-1024x683.jpg)

### Bangsar, Kuala Lumpur

Nestled in the vibrant neighborhood of Bangsar, Kuala Lumpur, Haywood Living provides a unique blend of premium elderly care and urban convenience. Our prime location in one of the city’s most dynamic areas ensures that residents have easy access to top-tier medical facilities, a variety of cultural attractions, and excellent transport links.

*   Prime Bangsar Location
*   Convenient Access
*   Tranquil Environment

![](https://haywoodliving.co/wp-content/uploads/2024/11/2024-04-06.jpg)

### Dorsett Putrajaya

Located in the vibrant and scenic city of Putrajaya, Dorsett Putrajaya offers a premium elderly care experience in a tranquil and well-planned environment. Our location blends the beauty of Putrajaya’s green spaces and modern architecture with exceptional care facilities, providing residents with a peaceful retreat while staying close to essential services, government offices, and local attractions. services and attractions.

*   Modern Elegance
*   Tranquil Surroundings
*   Prime Location

![forest city gelang patah jb](https://haywoodliving.co/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/forest-city-gelang-patah-jb.jpg)

### Dorsett Grand, Subang

Located in the prestigious and dynamic area of Subang Jaya, Dorsett Grand Subang offers a premium elderly care experience in a sophisticated and tranquil setting. Our location blends modern luxury with convenient access to the vibrant city life, ensuring residents enjoy comfort and connection to essential services and attractions.

*   Modern Luxury
*   Peaceful Ambience
*   Central Accessibility

![tanjung bungah](https://haywoodliving.co/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/tanjung-bungah-1024x683.jpg)

### Tanjung Bungah, Penang

Situated in the scenic and tranquil area of Tanjung Bungah, Penang, Haywood Living offers a premium elderly care experience surrounded by natural beauty and coastal charm. Our location combines the serenity of Penang’s coastline with modern amenities, providing residents with a peaceful retreat that is still conveniently connected to essential services and local attractions.

*   Scenic Coastal Location
*   Tranquil Retreat
*   Convenient Connectivity

![boon lay](https://haywoodliving.co/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/boon-lay.jpg)

### Boonlay, Singapore

Located in the vibrant and well-connected district of Boon Lay, Singapore, Haywood Living provides a premium elderly care experience with unparalleled urban convenience. Our facility offers residents a blend of modern comforts and serene living, all while being situated close to essential services, shopping centers, and excellent public transportation links.

*   Prime Boon Lay Location
*   Urban Convenience
*   Serene Comfort

![upper bukit timah firestation](https://haywoodliving.co/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/upper-bukit-timah-firestation-1024x630.jpg)

### Upper Bukit Timah, Singapore

Nestled in the serene and lush area of Upper Bukit Timah, Singapore, Haywood Living offers a premium elderly care experience amidst nature’s tranquility and urban convenience. Our location combines the peaceful ambiance of Bukit Timah’s greenery with proximity to essential services, making it an ideal setting for relaxation and well-being.

*   Serene Natural Setting
*   Urban Convenience
*   Premium Care Environment

Kuala Lumpur Johor Bahru Genting Highlands, Pahang

![haywood living at domitys bangsar](https://haywoodliving.co/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/haywood-living-at-domitys-bangsar-1024x683.jpg)

### Bangsar, Kuala Lumpur

Nestled in the vibrant neighborhood of Bangsar, Kuala Lumpur, Haywood Living provides a unique blend of premium elderly care and urban convenience. Our prime location in one of the city’s most dynamic areas ensures that residents have easy access to top-tier medical facilities, a variety of cultural attractions, and excellent transport links.

*   Prime Bangsar Location
*   Convenient Access
*   Tranquil Environment

![medini jb elderly care](https://haywoodliving.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/06/medini-jb-1024x944.jpg)

### Medini Iskandar Puteri, Johor Bahru

At Haywood Senior Living Medini, we redefine aging by blending rehabilitation, recovery, and retirement into a seamless and dignified experience.

Set within a premium hotel-style environment in the heart of Medini, Iskandar Puteri, our facility offers a full spectrum of care — including physiotherapy, day care, assisted living, short-term rehabilitation, and long-term stays. Dedicated to support seniors and individuals with evolving care needs in a setting that feels like home — with comfort, service, and attention

*   3 mins to Gleneagles Medini
*   15mins to JB city centre
*   20km to Tuas checkpoint (Singapore)

![elderly care genting highlands](https://haywoodliving.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/06/ion-majestic-genting.jpg)

### Ion Majestic, Genting Highlands

At **Haywood Senior Living-Genting Highlands**, where independent lifestyle meets fresh mountain air — 6,000 feet above sea level. Haywood provides a 400 sqft fully serviced studio apartment, complete with a private balcony and modern washroom, designed for seniors who value comfort, privacy, and freedom.

Residents enjoy access to premium facilities including a heated swimming pool, fitness centre, children’s playground, and on-site dining options. Just a 10-minute drive from Genting SkyWorlds, SkyAvenue, and the casino, and 20 minutes to Genting Premium Outlets, the location offers convenience and entertainment at every turn. Getting around is easy with Grab or the available shuttle service (fee applies). At Haywood, independent living is not just safe and comfortable — it’s rejuvenating.

*   Privacy & Peace Away from the City Rush
*   24/7 Security & Concierge Services
*   Panoramic Mountain & Cloud Views
*   Highest-altitude hotel

[Our Locations](https://haywoodliving.co/location/)

Why Haywood Living?

## We Redefine Retirement

At Haywood Living, we redefine retirement as a time of renewal and joy. Our approach transforms traditional views of aging into a vibrant chapter of life, where every day is filled with opportunities for enjoyment, personal growth, and rejuvenation. Experience retirement like never before—full of vitality, comfort, and endless possibilities.

*   Active & youthful Environment
*   Fun & Interactive activities
*   Surrounded with peers

[Our Elderly care service](https://haywoodliving.co/services/)

## Our Team

## Providing Quality Senior Living

At Haywood Living, we are dedicated to providing quality senior living that prioritizes comfort, well-being, and dignity. Our premium care services, state-of-the-art facilities, and compassionate staff ensure that every resident enjoys a fulfilling and enriching lifestyle, tailored to their individual needs and preferences.

[Meet Our Team](https://haywoodliving.co/team/)

![haywood doctor taking blood pressure of female elder](https://haywoodliving.co/wp-content/uploads/2024/09/haywood-doctor-taking-blood-pressure-of-female-elder-768x512.webp)
